---
name: Good first issue idea
about: Suggest a focused beginner-friendly contribution
title: "[Good First Issue]: "
labels: good first issue
assignees: ""
---

## Task

What small, focused task should be done?

## Why It Matters

How does this help developers integrate private AI, RAG, or company AI infrastructure safely?

## Expected Output

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Example config
- [ ] Test
- [ ] CLI behavior
- [ ] Validation rule
- [ ] Other

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The change is small and reviewable.
- [ ] The behavior or doc is clear.
- [ ] No secrets or private company data are included.
- [ ] Safety defaults are preserved.
